name: rw-screen-monorepo
description: Retraction Watch screening monorepo: core engine + ingest pipeline + Next.js web app.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @rw/core && npm run build -w @rw/ingest
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @rw/core && npm run typecheck -w @rw/ingest && npm run typecheck -w @rw/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @rw/core && npm run test -w @rw/ingest && npm run test -w @rw/web
scripts.mcpb:pack: npm run mcpb:stage && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack mcpb/build/retraction-watch-mcp
